global.description: The ad features a modern design with a focus on security and simplicity.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple app experience.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: The logo 'VaultRun' is displayed prominently at the top in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, in a lighter shade of purple.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape positioned slightly above the main subject, adding depth.

elements.label: Additional circular shape
elements.description: A circular shape that appears to be part of the main subject, enhancing the design.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Secure & simple Built for peace of mind' is displayed in a clear, readable font at the center.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple Built for peace of mind

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: The 'VaultRun' logo appears in the top left corner, small but distinct.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Install now' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label in the top left corner that reads 'UGC' in a simple font.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
